info.name: Anti-Cheat Backend
info.description:
Complete Postman Collection v2.1 for the Laravel Anti-Cheat Backend API.

## Setup
1. Import this collection and `Environment.postman_environment.json`.
2. Select the **Anti-Cheat Local** environment.
3. Ensure `baseUrl` is `http://127.0.0.1:8000` (no trailing slash, no `/api`).
4. Run **Login (Instructor)** or **Login (Student)** — the Bearer token is saved automatically.
5. All authenticated requests reuse `{{token}}` via collection-level Bearer auth.

## Important
All API endpoints use the `{{apiBaseUrl}}` prefix (`http://127.0.0.1:8000/api`).
Do not call `/register` or `/profile` without the `/api` prefix — those are web routes.

item.name: Auth & Profile
item.description: Public auth endpoints and profile. Login/Register automatically save the Bearer token to the environment.

request.description: Register a new instructor account. Returns token on success.
Register a new student account. Returns token on success.
Login as instructor. Automatically captures Bearer token to `{{token}}`.
Login as student. Automatically captures Bearer token to `{{token}}`.
Revoke the current access token.
Get the authenticated user's profile.

item.name: Instructor APIs
item.description: Endpoints requiring the instructor role. Login as instructor first.

request.description: Instructor dashboard stats: courses, exams, students, violations.
Paginated list of courses owned by the instructor.
Create a new course. Auto-saves `courseId` and `joinCode`.
Get course details including exams.
Update course fields.
Delete a course.
Bulk import students from CSV. Header row: name,email,password
Paginated list of exams owned by the instructor.
Create an exam for a course. Auto-saves `examId`.
Get exam with questions and options (includes is_correct for instructor).
Update exam fields.
Delete an exam.
List all violations reported for an exam.
Paginated list of students who took the exam. Marks the exam submission notification as read.
Detailed result for a single student including answers, violations, and AI status.
Paginated list of questions for an exam.
Create an MCQ question with options. Auto-saves questionId and option IDs.
Create a true/false question.
Create a free-text question (no options).
Get a single question with options.
Update question fields.
Delete a question.
Paginated list of options for a question.
Add an option to an existing question.
Get a single option.
Update an option.
Delete an option.

item.name: Student APIs
item.description: Endpoints requiring the student role. Login as student first.

request.description: Student dashboard: enrolled courses, exams taken, available exams.
Enroll in a course using its join code.
List courses the student is enrolled in.
List exams currently available to take.
Start an exam attempt. Returns questions without correct answers. Saves `exam_student_id` to `{{sessionId}}` for proctoring.

formdata.description: Select postman/test-frame.jpg or any JPEG/PNG webcam frame.

request.description: Send a webcam frame to Laravel → FastAPI for AI proctoring. Run Start Exam first. Requires AI service: uvicorn backend.api.main:app --port 8001
Submit exam answers. MCQ/true_false require option_id; text questions require answer_text.
Submit a text-type question answer.
Get the student's result for a submitted exam.
Report an anti-cheat violation. Types: face_not_detected, multiple_faces, tab_switch, screen_share. Requires exam to be started first.
Report face not detected violation.

item.name: AI Service (FastAPI)
item.description: Direct HTTP calls to the FastAPI anti-cheat service (default http://127.0.0.1:8001). Start with: .\scripts\start-ai-service.ps1

exec: pm.test('Has service name', () => pm.expect(json.service).to.eql('Anti Cheat AI'));

request.description: Verify FastAPI is running. Expected: {"status":"ok","service":"Anti Cheat AI"}

formdata.description: Proctoring session id (exam_student_id from Start Exam, or any string for direct AI test)
Webcam frame JPEG/PNG. Use postman/test-frame.jpg from repo.

request.description: Send frame directly to FastAPI. Returns yolo, gaze, and anti_cheat session state.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: Notification endpoints available to any authenticated user.

request.description: Paginated list of notifications. Auto-saves first notificationId.
Get count of unread notifications.
Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read.
Delete a single notification.
Delete all notifications.
